s: In 2016, Jake Barrett suited up for ARI as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.490, WHIP 1.260, SO 56, WAR 0.300.
In 2017, Jake Barrett suited up for ARI as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.000, WHIP 1.560, SO 26, WAR -0.400.
In 2018, Jake Barrett suited up for ARI as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.140, WHIP 1.430, SO 6, WAR 0.000.
Changed teams after the previous season (ARI -> NYY).
In 2019, Jake Barrett suited up for NYY as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 14.730, WHIP 2.180, SO 4, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined NYY.
